boundary_binding.action_boundary: May facilities execute the hot-work start?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match; ignition-control status is PENDING, not CLOSED. Policy requires CLOSED status before start. Blocked.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: Hot-work permit PERMIT-EMB-085 shows active fire watch FW-6 and spark-shield controls remain PENDING. Policy STD-EMB-085-P requires ignition-control status CLOSED before start. No source provides CLOSED status.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Deterministic source defect confirmed: PENDING status cannot satisfy exact-match requirement for CLOSED. Workers xai and google both ESCALATE. Deterministic gate passed. Abstract-field trap resolved.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Permit date and scope match, but ignition-control authority remains unconfirmed. PENDING status is not equivalent to CLOSED per policy.

final_answer: Action may not proceed. Source records PERMIT-EMB-085 and ACCESS-EMB-085 confirm ignition-control status is PENDING and requires separate verification. Policy STD-EMB-085-P requires CLOSED status before hot-work start. No source provides CLOSED status. Workers xai and google both ESCALATE; deterministic gate passed; defect is deterministic. FAIL_CLOSED. PENDING status cannot satisfy exact-match requirement for CLOSED. Hot-work start blocked until ignition-control closure is verified and recorded.
open_blockers: Ignition-control status PENDING in PERMIT-EMB-085; STD-EMB-085-P requires CLOSED status before start; no source provides CLOSED status; abstract-field trap confirmed; PENDING cannot satisfy exact-match requirement.

Gov conflict resolved: Gov baton confirms deterministic defect; PENDING ≠ CLOSED per policy exact-match; workers xai and google both ESCALATE; FINAL_COMPILER preserves ESCALATE and outputs FAIL_CLOSED.
